{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=The cauldron that Taotie used to eat with. The saliva left behind by Taotie over the years gave the cauldron a portion of its power. When Snail puts it on, power surges through their body live lava, and devours everything in their stomach.
|affct=CIV
|hard=RUSH
|source=Divine Order Chest (0.1%)
|color=orange
|earth=10
|water=10
|fire=11
|wind=11
|form=Mutant
|element=Fire
|realm=Koryeo
|orangehard=HP
}}
